title: Grade 5 Rare Materials Collected
query: SELECT SUM(Count) AS total FROM MaterialCollected WHERE Grade = 5 AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Name_Localised, Name) AS label, SUM(Count) AS value FROM MaterialCollected WHERE Grade = 5 AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Name ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} Grade 5 material unit(s) collected during the report period. G5 materials are the bottleneck of every serious engineer build — seeing how much of each rare material you've accumulated validates the grind and shows whether your stockpile can sustain continued high-grade crafting.
details.help: Grade 5 is the maximum rarity tier. MaterialCollected Grade = 5 filters to only the highest tier. total drives the title as the premium material haul.

tagLines: Grade 5 material acquisition log compiled. Rare material stockpile additions noted in the engineering record.
Grade 5 materials define the ceiling of what your engineer builds can be. You're stocking that ceiling.
Every G5 has a specific source. Finding enough of them is half the engineering journey.
